name: The Coalition Casserole
text:
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice The Coalition Casserole: You gain 3 life and draw a card. Then any opponent may say "that smells amazing" out loud; the first who does creates a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token under your control, because now they're at your potluck.
{1}, {T}: Add {G} or {W}. (Casserole runs on potluck logic.)
flavorText: Seven layers. Nobody remembers what's in layer four. Everyone agrees it's load-bearing.

extras.fourthWall: opponent says a phrase out loud
